holdings.infoBox: FVAL is an equity ETF with a total of 131 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.40%, Apple at 6.46%, Fidelity Cash Central Fund at 6.23%, Alphabet at 5.32%, and Microsoft at 4.24%.

overview.description: The Fidelity Value Factor ETF (FVAL) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Fidelity U.S. Value Factor index. The fund follows a fundamentally selected, tier-weighted index of large-cap US stocks. FVAL was launched on Sep 12, 2016 and is issued by Fidelity.

data.title: 10 Best Value ETFs to Buy for Bundled Bargains
data.text: Value stocks are finally having their day, and many expect the run to continue. These are the best value ETFs to leverage this long-awaited revival.

data.text: Value stocks might finally have their day – and that means great things for a host of long-maligned value exchange-traded funds (ETFs). Growth has been running up the score against value for more than...
